preview_evidence: verify.json records browser evidence as skipped because no rendered product UI changed.
skills/ai-team-supervisor/SKILL.md now owns routing judgment and defines agent/sub-skill dispatch.
npm run ai:route output was verified as advisory-only.

summary.rationale: The workflow now matches the intended Tastyroad-style pattern: Supervisor is an operational skill, external/domain skills support roles, and scripts are deterministic helpers rather than routing owners.

notes: The script route helper no longer mutates run.json.
The role of Supervisor, sub-agents, sub-skills, and helper scripts is now easier to distinguish.
The workflow stays dense and operational.
